title: Conversational AI Agent with Streaming STT and TTS
description: A technical demonstration of a conversational AI agent that combines streaming speech-to-text and text-to-speech capabilities. The agent engages users in natural language interactions using Deepgram's Agent API, showcasing real-time voice conversation with low latency and natural responses. Built with Next.js and React, it demonstrates how to build virtual assistants, educational tutors, and customer service applications.
